intro: Escape to a vibrant island where farming, cooking, and exploration come together. Grow crops, restore old places, and build your dream café.
description:
* Build Your Dream Farm *
Harvest Cafe is a cozy open-world farming and restaurant adventure set on a beautiful island full of charm, opportunities, and secrets to uncover. Grow a variety of crops, gather useful materials, and expand your land as you build the farm of your dreams.

* Cook and Serve Delicious Meals *
Turn your harvest into delicious meals and serve them in your very own restaurant in the village center. Unlock new recipes, expand your menu, and keep customers coming back for more as your café grows into one of the island’s favorite destinations.

* Explore and Restore the Island *
There is more to the island than farming and cooking. Explore abandoned harbors, buildings, and shops, restore forgotten places, and help bring life back to the island. As you repair and improve the world around you, more tourists begin to arrive.

* Grow Your Business *
As your business grows, so do your opportunities. Upgrade your restaurant, hire staff such as cooks and waiters, and serve more customers with greater efficiency. From humble beginnings to a bustling island hotspot, every step of your journey brings new rewards.
